name: Stockpile Relic
description: The Stockpile Relic is a common Eridian relic in Borderlands 2.
notes:
Increases carrying capacity for up to three ammo types, and can also raise your maximum grenades.

Its ammo bonus overlaps with Blood of the Ancients, which also includes a health boost.

special.description:
Up to +6 grenades.

Up to +78.5% ammo capacity for a single ammo type.
